description.overview: The Briard is a French herding breed known for its long, flowing coat and devotion to family.
description.temperament: Briards are loyal protectors with gentle hearts. They're intelligent and devoted to their families.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, bloat, and eye problems.
description.exercise: High energy. Need daily exercise and mental stimulation.

verdict.summary: Loyal French sheepdogs with flowing coats and protective hearts. Briards are devoted family dogs but need extensive grooming and exercise.
